background_gradient.label: Background gradient
background_gradient.info: Background gradient replaces background where possible.

paragraph_grid.content: Affects areas with multiple columns or rows.

type_header_font.label: Font
type_header_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_body_font.label: Font
type_body_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

currency_format.paragraph: Cart and checkout prices always show currency codes. Example: $1.00 USD.

pill.label: Popular search
pill.info: Use bullet list to apply popular search

favicon.label: Favicon image
favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: Insert link to word to display border around word

header__1.info: Newsletter subscribers added automatically to your “accepted marketing” customer list.

header__2.info: To display your social media accounts, link them in your theme settings.

header__3.info: To add a country/region, go to your region settings.

show_menu_hamburger.label: Show menu hamburger
show_menu_hamburger.info: Show hamburger menu on desktop screen. Only available for Hamburger header.

sticky_header_type.label: Sticky header type
sticky_header_type.info: Header shows on the screen as customers scroll up.

language_select.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings.](/admin/settings/languages)

currency_select.info: To add a country/region, go to your [market settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

image_height.label: Featured image height
image_height.info: For best results, use an image with a 16:9 aspect ratio. Learn more

featured_image_info.content: If you include a link in social media posts, the page's featured image will be shown as the preview image. Learn more.

title_info.content: A store title and description are included with the preview image. Learn more.

paragraph.content: Each email subscription creates a customer account.

image_height.label: Image height
image_height.info: For best results, use an image with a 16:9 aspect ratio.

hide_variants.label: Hide other variants’media after selecting a variant

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift cards
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Allows buyers to send gift cards on a scheduled date along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

paragraph.label: Variant pills are one way of displaying your product variants. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/themes/theme-structure/page-types#variant-picker-block)

variant_color_style.label: Variant color style
variant_color_style.info: Color swatches are Shopify's default swatch settings  [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields)

header_text.info: Text use only in product information style columns

use_custom.label: Choose option
use_custom.info: Choose between your liquid or our custom offering

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

checked_value.label: Checked value
checked_value.info: Checked value only apply to checkbox type

uncheck_value.label: Uncheck value
uncheck_value.info: Uncheck value only apply to checkbox type

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/themes/development/recommended-products)

filter_type.label: Desktop filter layout
filter_type.info: Drawer is the default mobile layout.

colors.label: Color scheme
colors.has_cards_info: To change the card color scheme, update your theme settings.

video_url.label: Video url
video_url.info: Use a YouTube or Vimeo URL

include_margins.label: Make section margins the same as theme

category_animation.info: Only works with small icon category type

product_list.label: Product list
product_list.info: Choose discounted products. Discounted products are set in the store settings.

discount_type.label: Discount type
discount_type.info: Set the discount type to match the store settings and the selected products above.

value_discount.label: Discount value
value_discount.info: Set the discount value to match the store settings and the selected products above. If you select 'fixed amount', then add 00 in the end. Example: real discount value is $20.00, input your value is 2000.

image.info: Should choose image with size 1200 x 800
